package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerFrameworkPerformanceGinContextCopiedForSyncPath() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_framework_performance_gin_context_copied_for_sync_path"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Framework-specific performance. Flag Gin context Copy calls where work remains synchronous and request-scoped."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
